contributors.description: The creators, maintainers and contributors of the OCA modules

companies.title: OCA Companies
companies.description: The companies that support the OCA and its contributors

bugTracker.title: Bug tracker
bugTracker.description: Bugs are tracked on GitHub Issues. In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported. If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed feedback.  Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.

runboat.name: Runboat
runboat.how_to_test: How to test an OCA module

maintainer.title: Maintainers
maintainer.description: OCA, or the Odoo Community Association, is a nonprofit organization whose mission is to support the collaborative development of Odoo features and promote its widespread use.
maintainer.intro: This module is maintained by the OCA.

empty.title: No modules found
empty.description: It appears that no modules match your search. Please adjust your search criteria to continue.

page.title: Discover our community
page.description: Discover our great community of passionate members and contributors around the globe.

cta.groupsEmptyTitle: This person is not yet par of a group
cta.groupsDescription: Discover all avaialble workign groups and join the one that fits you best
cta.getInvolvedTitle: Help us make Odoo mightier together
cta.getInvolvedDescription: Come lend a hand and help build the largest community of Odoo open-source enthusiasts. Whether you’re a developer, a consultant, a business user, or just an open-source enthusiast, we’d love to have you join us.
cta.ctaGroupsLabel: Join one of the working groups

description.default: {company} is a company member of  the Odoo Community Association

cookies_consent.title: We use cookies
cookies_consent.description: These cookies are intended to provide you with an optimized browsing experience on this website and to give us insight into its usage, with the aim of improving the services we offer. By continuing to browse, we consider that you accept the use of cookies.
cookies_consent.preferences_description: Select the types of cookies you wish to allow.

necessary_cookies.label: Necessary cookies
necessary_cookies.description: These cookies are essential for the website to function and cannot be disabled.

gtm.label: Google Tag Manager
gtm.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website.
